metadata.name: Agent Evaluation Sample Dataset
metadata.description: 50 multi-step agent tasks using mock tools for Phase 3 testing

tasks.query: Search the knowledge base for information about the Transformer architecture in the AI domain.
tasks.ground_truth: The Transformer architecture was introduced in 2017 by Vaswani et al. It uses self-attention mechanisms to process sequences in parallel, replacing recurrence.

function.name: search_knowledge_base
function.description: Search a knowledge base for facts on a given topic.

tasks.query: Look up information about the COVID-19 pandemic in the medicine knowledge base.
tasks.ground_truth: COVID-19 is caused by SARS-CoV-2, first identified in Wuhan in December 2019. It spreads via respiratory droplets. mRNA vaccines were developed by Pfizer-BioNTech and Moderna.

function.name: search_knowledge_base
function.description: Search a knowledge base for facts on a given topic.

tasks.query: Find out when World War II started and ended using the history knowledge base.
tasks.ground_truth: World War II (1939-1945) involved the Axis vs Allies. It began with Germany's invasion of Poland and ended with Japan's surrender after atomic bombings.

function.name: search_knowledge_base
function.description: Search a knowledge base for facts on a given topic.

tasks.query: What is LoRA and how is it used in AI? Use the knowledge base.
tasks.ground_truth: LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) is a parameter-efficient fine-tuning method that adds low-rank matrices to pre-trained weights, reducing trainable parameters by 10000x.

function.name: search_knowledge_base
function.description: Search a knowledge base for facts on a given topic.

tasks.query: Tell me about the discovery of penicillin. Search in medicine.
tasks.ground_truth: Penicillin was discovered by Alexander Fleming in 1928. It is a beta-lactam antibiotic that inhibits bacterial cell wall synthesis.

function.name: search_knowledge_base
function.description: Search a knowledge base for facts on a given topic.

tasks.query: What were the emergent abilities of LLMs? Use the AI knowledge base.
tasks.ground_truth: Emergent abilities of LLMs include in-context learning, chain-of-thought reasoning, instruction following, and tool use.

function.name: search_knowledge_base
function.description: Search a knowledge base for facts on a given topic.

tasks.query: How does MRI technology work? Search the medicine knowledge base.
tasks.ground_truth: MRI uses strong magnetic fields and radio waves to produce detailed images of organs and tissues. It does not use ionizing radiation.

function.name: search_knowledge_base
function.description: Search a knowledge base for facts on a given topic.

tasks.query: Calculate 15 * 8 + 42.
tasks.ground_truth: 15 * 8 = 120, plus 42 = 162. The result is 162.

tasks.ground_truth: 45 + 27 = 72, times 3 = 216. The result is 216.

tasks.query: Search for information about gene therapy in the medicine domain, then also search for information about CRISPR.
tasks.ground_truth: Gene therapy introduces genetic material into cells to treat disease. CRISPR-Cas9, discovered in 2012, enables precise gene editing by cutting DNA at specific sequences.

tasks.query: Search for what RAG is in AI, then also search for information about text embeddings in AI.
tasks.ground_truth: RAG combines a retriever with a generative LLM to ground responses in external documents. Text embeddings are dense vector representations where semantically similar texts are close in vector space.

function.name: search_knowledge_base
function.description: Search a knowledge base for facts on a given topic.

tasks.query: Compare the Apollo 11 moon landing with the French Revolution by searching history knowledge base for both.
tasks.ground_truth: Apollo 11 landed on the Moon on July 20, 1969. The French Revolution (1789-1799) overthrew the monarchy. These events occurred about 180 years apart.

function.name: search_knowledge_base
function.description: Search a knowledge base for facts on a given topic.

tasks.query: Search for information about vaccines in medicine, and also search for COVID-19 in medicine.
tasks.ground_truth: Vaccines train the immune system by exposing it to antigens. Types include mRNA, viral vector, inactivated, and subunit. COVID-19 mRNA vaccines were developed by Pfizer-BioNTech and Moderna.

tasks.ground_truth: Engineering highest: Henry Jones ($170,000). Marketing highest: Carol Davis ($120,000). Difference: $50,000. Henry earns more by $50,000.

tasks.query: Find all employees hired before 2020 and calculate their average salary.
tasks.ground_truth: Hired before 2020: Alice Chen (2019, $150K), David Lee (2017, $160K), Frank Wang (2019, $130K), Henry Jones (2016, $170K). Average: (150+160+130+170)/4 = $152,500.

tasks.query: Search the knowledge base for information about fine-tuning in AI, then search for tokenization in AI. Explain how they relate.
tasks.ground_truth: Fine-tuning updates a pre-trained model's weights on task-specific data. Tokenization splits text into tokens using subword methods like BPE. Effective fine-tuning depends on proper tokenization of the training data.

tasks.query: Search for information about type 2 diabetes and then search for information about the industrial revolution. Are these topics related?
tasks.ground_truth: Type 2 diabetes is a metabolic disorder characterized by insulin resistance. The Industrial Revolution transformed manufacturing through mechanization. These topics are not directly related but industrialization has impacted public health.

tasks.query: Search for the Roman Empire in history, then search for the moon landing in history. Which happened first?
tasks.ground_truth: The Roman Empire existed from 27 BCE to 476 CE. Apollo 11 landed on the Moon in 1969. The Roman Empire predates the moon landing by roughly 2,000 years.

tasks.query: Search the history knowledge base for information about the French Revolution and the Industrial Revolution. Compare their time periods.
tasks.ground_truth: The French Revolution was 1789-1799. The Industrial Revolution was 1760-1840. They overlapped: the Industrial Revolution was already underway when the French Revolution began.

tasks.query: Compare GPT-4 and LoRA: search the AI knowledge base for both and explain how they relate.
tasks.ground_truth: GPT-4 is OpenAI's multimodal LLM released in 2023. LoRA is a parameter-efficient fine-tuning method. LoRA can be used to fine-tune large models like GPT-4 for specific tasks.

tasks.query: Find the second most expensive product. First look up all products, identify by price order.
tasks.ground_truth: Products by price: Standing Desk ($450), Monitor 27" ($320), Office Chair ($280), Laptop Pro ($1200), Desk Lamp ($55). Second most expensive: Standing Desk at $450. Wait, actually: Laptop Pro ($1200), Standing Desk ($450), Monitor 27" ($320), Office Chair ($280), Desk Lamp ($55), USB-C Hub ($45), Wireless Mouse ($35). Second: Standing Desk at $450.

tasks.query: Search all three knowledge bases (AI, medicine, history) for the term 'revolution' and summarize findings.
tasks.ground_truth: AI: no direct revolution term, but the Transformer (2017) revolutionized NLP. Medicine: Penicillin revolutionized infectious disease treatment. History: The French Revolution (1789-1799) and Industrial Revolution (1760-1840) were transformative periods.

function.name: search_knowledge_base
function.description: Search a knowledge base for facts on a given topic.

tasks.query: Calculate the total potential gross profit if all products are sold at full price and employees are only from Engineering department (use their total salary as cost).
tasks.ground_truth: Total product value: $106,500. Engineering total salary: $615,000. Gross profit: $106,500 - $615,000 = -$508,500 (a loss, since annual salaries far exceed one-time inventory value).
